description: The Mongols Motorcycle Club is an international outlaw motorcycle gang founded on December 5, 1969 in Montebello, California. The club is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and violent crimes. It has chapters in 28 countries and an estimated membership of 4,000–5,000. The club is designated as an outlaw motorcycle gang by law enforcement in multiple countries.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Mongols expanded into Australia in 2013, establishing three chapters on the Central Coast of New South Wales.
country_links.context: The Mongols expanded into Australia, establishing chapters and patching over the Finks.

country_links.evidence_quote: A German chapter of the Mongols MC was founded in Bremen by members of the local crime syndicate run by Lebanese immigrants in 2010.
country_links.context: A German chapter of the Mongols MC was founded in Bremen.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club is involved in the retail-level distribution of methamphetamine and Mexican-produced marijuana in the Oklahoma City and Tulsa areas.
country_links.context: The Mongols source Mexican-produced marijuana for retail distribution in Oklahoma.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 11 October 2014, the Mongols announced the opening of a chapter in Amsterdam.
country_links.context: The Mongols announced the opening of a chapter in Amsterdam and were involved in a brawl in Rotterdam.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Mongols were established in New Zealand amidst a wave of motorcycle gang members being deported back to the country from Australia.
country_links.context: The Mongols were established in New Zealand and involved in a turf war.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Mongols were granted free rein over Southern California... The Mongols, in turn, were forbidden from expanding into Northern California... By 2002, the Mongols had begun establishing a presence in Northern California... search warrants were also executed at Mongols clubhouses in Georgia and Oklahoma.
country_links.context: The Mongols MC operates chapters, engages in violent conflicts with the Hells Angels, and conducts criminal activities across multiple U.S. states including California, Nevada, Oklahoma, Georgia, and others.
